sections.paragraph:
Original: נבות

Transliteration: nâbôth

Phonetic: naw-both'

BDB Definition:

Naboth = "fruits"
  1. the vineyard owner of Jezreel who Ahab and Jezebel had killed so that they could have his vineyard

Origin: from the same as H5011

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
